Class ChartLine

java.lang.Object
chart.ChartLine
public class ChartLine extends Object
Modern Line Chart with enhanced styling and trend visualization Features: Modern colors, smooth lines, improved readability

      monthlyTotals - map of month number to total expenses
      year - the year

      year - the year
      category - the category name

      styled JFreeChart
